Project Description:
- Negotiated procedure to conclude multi-supplier framework agreements (per lot) for IT services (AUS23E015)
- Lots: 18 (System Administration Server/Application Ops), 24 (Outputmanager Engineer), 31 (SAP Technology), 32 (SAP HCM/HXM Consulting & Development)
- Term: 4 years + option 1 year; no purchase obligation; non-exclusive; mini-competitions/call-offs
- Annual max call-off volumes (all roles): Lot 18: 22,000 PT; Lot 24: 500 PT; Lot 31: 3,000 PT; Lot 32: 2,000 PT
- Framework partners: Lot 18: 5; Lots 24/31/32: 3 each
- Language of procedure/performance: German; performance partly on-site in Vienna
Important Dates:
- Questions deadline: 19.2.2024, 12:00
- Participation request deadline: 11.3.2024, 12:00
- Invite to first offers: 23.4.2024
- Negotiations: Lot 18: 27.5.2024; Lots 24/31: 28.5.2024; Lot 32: 29.5.2024
- Invite to final offers: 13.6.2024; Final-offer deadline: 5.7.2024
- Concept presentations: Lot 18: 22.–23.7.2024; Lot 31: 5.–6.8.2024
- Framework conclusion target: KW 37/2024

Scope & Requirements.Scope & Requirements:
- Lot 18 — System Administrator Server & Application Operations:
  - Deliverables: Install/upgrade/patching; secure config; OS (Windows/Linux) deployments; storage (SAN/NAS); central backup/restore/DR; fileservices; AD/Red Hat Directory; Microsoft Exchange; MDM; UC; DB ops; monitoring; incident/change/release mgmt; documentation (DE).
  - Key requirements: On-site as needed; 7x24h on-call if required; German C1/B2 and English B2 (role-dependent); ITIL Foundation; scripting (PowerShell/Shell); VMware; security best practice; concept presentation by key person.
  - Numeric/SLAs/tools: 7x24h readiness (if called off); concept max 8 pages; tools incl. Veeam/Commvault (nice-to-have), SQL Server, Automation Hub/containers.
- Lot 24 — Outputmanager Engineer (Form design):
  - Deliverables: Form development with Quadient Inspire; form implementation/operations; data intake (csv/xml); layouts (tables, page control, fields, graphics); duplex/media/tray control; handover to PrismaProduction; PDF with xml control; AFP output incl. NOP; OMR/Datamatrix for enveloping; invoices incl. payment slips; overlays; documentation (DE) in client system.
  - Key requirements: On-site as needed; Quadient Inspire expertise; concept (max 8 pages, pdf) in final offer.
  - Numeric/tools: Quadient Inspire; PrismaProduction; AFP/OMR/Datamatrix.
- Lot 31 — SAP Technology:
  - Deliverables: Architecture/design for SAP BTP; PI/PO/Integration Suite/Cell; MDG; SAP frontend dev (SAP BAS, SAPUI5, FIORI, CDS, ODATA, RAP, CAP); workflows; HANA dev; customizing (MM/PM/SD/SRM/CRM, GHT opt.); programming; lifecycle/quality/monitoring; docs.
  - Key requirements: On-site as needed; German C1; senior consulting across SAP Cloud/OnPrem; concept (8-page limit) and presentation by key person.
  - Tools: SAP BAS/Eclipse; SAP BTP/Cloud Services; Workflow; RAP/CAP; CDS/ODATA.
- Lot 32 — SAP HCM/HXM Consulting & Development:
  - Deliverables: SAP HR support; error/system analysis; customizing; roles/authorizations; ABAP support; CR development; solution scenarios; build HCM/HXM system; SuccessFactors projects; legacy requirements engineering; HR trainings.
  - Key requirements: On-site as needed; German C1; concept (8-page limit) and presentation by key person.
  - Tools: SAP S/4HANA; SAP SuccessFactors HXM Suite; ABAP.
- Cross-cutting:
  - Concept doc: max 8 pages (A4, pdf); K1–K4 qualitative evaluation; presentation 20+10 min by named key person only.
  - Recency for references: not completed before 1.3.2021; thresholds in PT per lot/categories (see Technical & Professional Ability).
Scope & Requirements.Contract Volume:
- Framework term: 4 years + 1-year option; no volume commitment; non-exclusive
- Annual ceilings per lot (all roles): L18 22,000 PT; L24 500 PT; L31 3,000 PT; L32 2,000 PT
- Framework partners: L18: 5; L24/L31/L32: 3; readiness time counts toward max volume per set %
Scope & Requirements.Place of Performance: Wien (Vienna), Austria; performance partly on-site per call-off
Scope & Requirements.Standards & Certifications:
- Communication/documentation in German; audit rights; indexation clause (unnegotiable)
- Compliance with EU Sanctions VO (EU) 2022/576 Art 5k (incl. >10% value for subs/suppliers)
- Personnel skills: ITIL Foundation (Lot 18); German language levels B2/C1 as specified; SAP tech stack proficiency (Lots 31/32); Quadient Inspire (Lot 24)
- Data protection: DSGVO notice provided
Scope & Requirements.Subcontracting & Consortia:
- Joint tenders (Bewerbergemeinschaft) allowed; ARGE (GbR) on award; all members jointly liable; federführer to be named; changes not allowed post-submission
- Subcontracting permitted; full pass-through prohibited; all intended subs (incl. sub-sub) to be disclosed per lot (B-XX-01) with share/value; changes/additions require prior written approval (deemed consent after 3 weeks if complete)
Scope & Requirements.Forms & e-Submission:
- Electronic-only via ANKÖ Vergabeportal; qualified e-signature; no paper/email; server time applies; no executable files
- Use provided forms: A-01, A-02 (if JV), A-03 (Russia sanctions); per-lot B-XX-01..07
- Reference sheets per lot to upload as unprotected Excel (B-18-08/B-24-08/B-31-08/B-32-08)
- Price sheet (Preisblatt) must be uploaded with offers; Concept (pdf, ≤8 pages) with final offer

Offer Submission Documents: B-XX-03 Subcontractor solidarity guarantee (if relied upon)
List of Documents: Current companies register extract (≤1 month; not for natural persons)
BMF AuslBG §28b and LSDB §35 evidences (≤6 months; CA queries)
Proof of liability insurance (≥EUR 100,000/500,000 per lot)
Language competence confirmation (DE B2/C1 as required)

Economic & Financial Standing.Minimum Turnover: Avg net turnover 2020–2022 (per lot): Lot 18 ≥ EUR 1,500,000; Lot 24 ≥ EUR 100,000; Lot 31 ≥ EUR 700,000; Lot 32 ≥ EUR 500,000 (declare via B-XX-05).
Economic & Financial Standing.Turnover in Comparable Services: Declare in B-XX-05 (2020/2021/2022 and average); reliance allowed with B-XX-04; required subs must provide B-XX-03.

Legal & Registration.Trade/Professional Register Entry: Provide register extract (≤1 month) or equivalent; CA queries GISA per §365e GewO.
Legal & Registration.Self-declarations (GWB §§123/124 or equi: BVergG §78 exclusion grounds self-declared in A-01; Russia sanctions Art 5k VO (EU) 2022/576 in A-03; CA may request criminal records (≤6 months).
Legal & Registration.Subcontractor Identification & Reliance: Name all subs in B-XX-01; capacity reliance via B-XX-04; required subs sign B-XX-03; changes/additions only with prior approval (§363 BVergG).

Technical & Professional Ability.Personnel Profiles:
- Lot 18 roles/skills:
  - System Administrator Junior (≥4 FTE): DE B2/EN B2; ICT education; infra basics (HW/SW/net/storage/backup); security; Windows/Linux; VMware; scripting (PowerShell/Shell); DE documentation; ITIL Foundation; nice-to-have: monitoring, Veeam/Commvault, SQL Server, containers/Automation Hub, HA, UC.
  - System Administrator Senior (≥2 FTE): ≥3y IT exp incl. ≥18m in one specialty (Directory, SAN/NAS, Exchange, DB, backup, UC); DE C1/EN B2; advanced planning/config/ops; VMware; scripting; security; ITIL Foundation.
  - Functional-organizational Coordinator (≥1 FTE): ≥2y IT coordination; DE C1/EN B2; IT education; deployment; OS knowledge; security.
- Lot 24 role:
  - Form designer (≥1 FTE): ≥1y Quadient Inspire; solid Quadient Inspire skills; DE B2.
- Lot 31 role:
  - SAP Consultant (≥5 FTE): ≥5y SAP consulting; senior knowledge in PI/PO/Integration Suite, MDG, dev env & frontend (UI5/FIORI/RAP/CAP), HANA, SAP Cloud Services; training delivery; requirements elicitation; DE C1.
- Lot 32 roles:
  - Consultant/Developer (≥3 FTE): ≥5y SAP HR dev + ≥2y SAP SuccessFactors HXM; certified Junior SAP HR; SuccessFactors project exp; DE C1.
  - Requirements Engineer (≥1 FTE): ≥5y requirements in HR; DE C1.
  - 3rd Level Support (≥1 FTE): ≥5y SAP HR + ≥2y SuccessFactors HXM support; certified Junior SAP HR; DE C1.
- Key person (overall contact): named with application; DE ≥B2; presents concept; no multiple nominations; lot-cross nomination allowed; changes only with CA consent.
Technical & Professional Ability.Headcount / Staffing:
- Lot 18: 4 FTE Junior + 2 FTE Senior + 1 FTE Coordinator (simultaneously available)
- Lot 24: 1 FTE Formulargestalter
- Lot 31: 5 FTE SAP Consultants
- Lot 32: 3 FTE Consultant/Developer + 1 FTE Requirements Engineer + 1 FTE 3rd Level Support
Technical & Professional Ability.Reference Projects:
- General: All refs must meet requirements by participation deadline; not fully completed before 1.3.2021; bidder (or JV member/affiliate/third party) must have performed required share; use lot ref sheets; bidder-ability refs cannot be reused for selection unless permitted (Lot 31 allows add’l scoring from Eignungsrefs).
- Lot 18 (Eignung):
  - Cat A: Ops tasks (install/upgrade/patch/secure config/OS best practices/fault analysis/DE docs); ≥200 PT (≥150 PT by 1 FTE); client >500 staff.
  - Cat B: OS/HW lifecycle support; install (phys/virt); control/monitor; automation analysis; incidents; DE docs; ≥150 PT (≥100 PT by 1 FTE); client >500 staff.
  - Selection Cat C (max 2): in distinct specialties (Directory, SAN/NAS, Exchange, DB, backup, MDM, UC); ops/coord/config/incident handling/DE docs; ≥100 PT (≥70 PT by 1 FTE); client >500 staff.

Company Referrals:
- Minimum references per lot (bidder/JV/affiliate/third party; provide on lot Excel sheets):
  - Lot 18: ≥2 Eignungsrefs (Cat A & B) + up to 2 selection refs (Cat C); client size >500; PT thresholds 200/150/100; recency ≥1.3.2021.
  - Lot 24: ≥1 Eignungsref (duration ≥6 months) + up to 2 selection refs; scope with Quadient Inspire/AFP/OMR etc.
  - Lot 31: ≥4 Eignungsrefs (Cats A–D; public sector; ≥20 PT) + 1 selection ref (Cat E); additional scoring from Eignungsrefs via add-ons (PT bands/healthcare/high-availability/interfaces≥6).
  - Lot 32: ≥3 Eignungsrefs (Cats A–C) + up to 2 selection refs (Cat D; S/4HANA+SuccessFactors; ≥10 PT; >1,000 employees).
Award Criteria:
- Two-stage procedure; per-lot selection caps to invite to offers: Lot 18: 7; Lots 24/31/32: 5.
- Price (50/100 points): linear formula Points = (2 – GP/GPmin) × 50; offer ≥100% above cheapest = 0 points; price sheet must be uploaded and value entered in portal (price sheet prevails).
- Quality – Concept (50/100 points total):
  - K1 (10%): Concept preparation (compliance with formalities, structure clarity, look & feel).
  - K2 (30%): Scaling & resource conservation (flex up/down; measures under limited client resources; knowledge transfer).
  - K3 (30%): Quality & change management (QA measures; handling change; info exchange with other suppliers).
  - K4 (30%): Controlling (methods for data capture/prep/doc for structured, complete, meaningful reporting).
- Concept submission & presentation: pdf, max 8 pages (excl. cover/ToC/abbr.); presentation by named key person only (20 min + 10 min Q&A); graded by 3-person panel using 1–5 note→points mapping (1=50 … 5=0), weighted per K1–K4.
- Tie-break: lower "Gesamtpreis" wins; frameworks: Lot 18 with 5 partners; Lots 24/31/32 with 3 partners each.
